parts.text: Please provide a summary of my recent calls, including dates and durations.
I want to delete or clear my call history entirely.

I’d like to check which numbers I called over
the last two weeks

I want to review my phone usage by checking my call records.

I’d like to delete specific calls from my call history.

the past month

yesterday
